codeReview.summary: Implementation matches the feature intent: duplicate UUID/pgtype helpers were centralized into internal/shared/pguuid, duplicate definitions were removed from production and test files, and call sites were updated consistently across the affected packages without introducing boundary violations or import-cycle risk.

sharedStateObservations.observation: .factory/library/architecture.md still describes internal/shared/uuid as the UUID/pgtype conversion helper location, but this feature established internal/shared/pguuid as the conversion helper package.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: .factory/library/architecture.md:43 says "shared/uuid/ — Shared UUID/pgtype conversion helpers" while commit ae3aacf adds internal/shared/pguuid/pguuid.go and updates 20+ internal files to import internal/shared/pguuid.

summary: Reviewed feature fnd-extract-uuid-helpers in commit ae3aacf9439da873b2df8dc29c273c1150d9ce6c. Result: pass, with no blocking or non-blocking code defects found. Noted one shared-state documentation gap in architecture.md regarding the new pguuid package.
